hidden_state.wab_instruction: Route three project emails to the correct team leads. Read each email to figure out who should handle it based on the content. For the customer complaint, BCC {target.manager_email} so they are aware without the customer seeing. Star the customer complaint as the most urgent. Create a 'Delegated' label and apply it to all three forwarded emails.
